recalls.Description: Deale International is recalling the Altafit af28 smartwatches due to a serious risk of burn injuries and fire hazards. These smartwatches, available in gold and silver finishes, feature a 1.68-inch color touchscreen and come with two bands: one bejeweled and one mesh. The watch is packaged in a gold case along with a wireless charging pad and cable, and bears the FCC ID "ALTAFIT FCC ID 2BHG8-AF28" on its back.
recalls.Title: Deale International Recalls Altafit Smartwatches Due to Burn and Fire Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers are urged to contact Deale International at 877-880-6137, available from 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. They can also reach out via email at altafitrecall@thedeale.com or visit www.thedeale.com/pages/altafit-safety-recall for further information. For additional details, visit www.thedeale.com and click on "RECALL INFORMATION" at the top of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Altafit af28 Smartwatch
Recalled Altafit af28 Smartwatch wireless charging pad

Injuries.Name: Deale International has received 39 reports of smartwatches melting, burning and catching on fire while charging, including six reports of burns to hands and property damage.

Retailers.Name: Available on HSN.com from March 2025 through May 2025 for approximately $50.

Importers.Name: Deale International LLC, of Fort Lauderdale, Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of overheating and ignition from the smartwatch's wireless charging pad, leading to potential burn injuries and fire hazards.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately disconnect the charging pad and cease charging the smartwatch. To obtain a free replacement, contact Deale International for further instructions. Consumers will need to cut the power cable of the unplugged charging pad and send a photo of the cut cable to altafitrecall@thedeale.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Deale International recalls Altafit smartwatches due to burn and fire hazards. Contact for a free replacement and safety instructions.

recalls.Description: Monica Vinader is recalling its 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelets, Necklaces, and Stud Earrings due to the presence of high levels of cadmium. These jewelry items, which feature mini heart pendants, were manufactured in October and November 2024. The chain bracelet measures approximately 15.3-19 cm, the necklace ranges from about 41-46 cm, and the earrings are sized at .35 cm x 0.4 cm x 0.1 mm.
recalls.Title: Monica Vinader Recalls 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Bracelets, Necklaces, and Earrings Due to Cadmium Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Monica Vinader at 888-580-8582 from 4 a.m. to 4 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email productrecall@monicavinader.com. More details are available at www.monicavinader.com/recall-hearts or by visiting www.monicavinader.com/us and selecting 'Recall Information' at the bottom of the page.

Products.Name: 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet

Images.Caption: Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet (SKU YG-BL-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Chain Bracelet (SKU YG-BL-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Necklace (SKU YG-NK-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Necklace (SKU YG-NK-HART-NON)
Recalled 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart Stud Earrings (SKU YG-EA-HARS-NON)

Retailers.Name: Available at Monica Vinader and Nordstrom retail locations, as well as online at www.monicavinader.com/us and www.nordstrom.com from January 20, 2025, to March 2025 for Monica Vinader products and from November 26, 2024, to May 2025 for Nordstrom, priced between $250 and $350.

Importers.Name: Monica Vinader Inc., of New York, New York
Monica Vinader Retail LLC, of Wilmington, Delaware

Hazards.Name: Excess cadmium levels posing toxicity risks if ingested by children and potential adverse health effects from prolonged skin exposure.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease wearing the recalled items immediately, keep them away from children, and contact Monica Vinader for a replacement or refund. Jewelry can be returned using a prepaid shipping label for a replacement or full refund via the original payment method or secure wire transfer if not available. To process a return, consumers can contact Monica Vinader or visit a store. Nordstrom customers may also return items directly to Nordstrom.

recalls.metaDescription: Monica Vinader recalls select 14k Yellow Gold Mini Heart jewelry due to cadmium risks. Learn how to return for a refund or replacement.

recalls.Description:
Innovative Designs is recalling Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets, specifically models 718508MCR and 718075MCR, available in pink and green. These bracelets feature the "MINECRAFT" logo on the packaging's front, with the model number located on the back. Each bracelet contains three pre-installed button cell batteries, which pose a significant safety hazard for children.

The design of the battery compartment allows easy access for children, increasing the risk of ingestion. If a child swallows a button cell or coin battery, it can lead to severe injuries, internal chemical burns, or even death. Parents and guardians are urged to take immediate action regarding these products to ensure child safety.
recalls.Title: Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets Recalled Due to Serious Injury Risk from Button Cell Battery Ingestion

Images.Caption: Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718508MCR - Front
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718508MCR – Back
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718075MCR - Front
Recalled Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelet, Model 718075MCR - Back

Injuries.Name: Innovative Designs has received one report of a battery separating from the toy. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at Walmart stores nationwide from March 2025 to May 2025 for approximately $2.

Importers.Name: Innovative Designs LLC, of New York

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from ingestion of button cell batteries

Remedies.Name: Stop using the bracelets immediately, keep them away from children, and contact Innovative Designs for disposal instructions and a full refund. To receive the refund, email a photo of the disposed item to info@innovativenyc.com. Remember, button cell batteries are hazardous and should be disposed of according to local hazardous waste guidelines.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Minecraft Light-Up Slap Ruler Bracelets due to battery ingestion risk. Immediate action required for child safety.

recalls.Description: LaRose Industries has issued a recall for 10 models of Cra-Z-Art Gemex and Gel2Gem jewelry kits, along with one refill pack. These kits include a resin bottle and a UV light for curing the resin, packaged in rectangular boxes featuring the "Cra-Z-Art" brand name along with either "Gemex" or "crazy gel2gem." The item numbers and UPC codes can be found on the bottom of the product box, which are essential for identification.
recalls.Title: LaRose Industries Recalls Cra-Z-Art Gemex and Gel2Gem Jewelry Kits Due to Skin, Eye, and Respiratory Irritation Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach LaRose Industries at their toll-free number 877-770-7029, available from 7:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday. Alternatively, they can email gemgel@realtimeresults.net or visit www.recallrtr.com/gemgel or https://cra-z-art.com/ and click on "Recall" at the bottom of the page for further details.

Products.Name: Cra-Z-Art Gemex Shimmer N Sparkle Gel Set

Images.Caption: Recalled Disney Minnie Gemex Sparkling Crystal Jewelry (UPC 884920365797)
Recalled Disney Princess Gemex Sparkling Crystal Necklaces (UPC 884920365834)
Recalled Disney Frozen Gemex Sparkling Crystal Jewelry (UPC 884920365896)
Recalled My Look Make Your Own Crystal Jewelry Creations (UPC 884920467910)
Recalled My Look Gemex Gel Creations Design Studio (UPC 884920469099)
Recalled My Look Gel2Gem Sparkling Sweets Charm Studio (UPC 884920469907)
Recalled Shimmer N Sparkle Gemex Gel Creations (UPC 884920655072)
Recalled Shimmer N Sparkle Gemex Design Studio (UPC 884920655089)
Recalled Disney Little Mermaid Gel2Gem Jewelry Making Kit (UPC 884920745025) - FRONT
Recalled Disney Little Mermaid Gel2Gem Jewelry Making Kit (UPC 884920745025) - BACK
Recalled Shimmer N Sparkle Gemex Gel Creations refill pack (884920250697)

Retailers.Name: Available at Target, Marshall's, T.J. Maxx, Joann stores, and various other retailers nationwide, as well as online at Amazon.com, Target.com, Walmart.com, and Joann.com from January 2023 to September 2024, priced between $13 and $36 depending on the kit.

Importers.Name: LaRose Industries LLC, dba Cra-Z-Art, of Randolph, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: The resin in these jewelry-making kits can cause skin, eye, and respiratory irritation or sensitization if inhaled, touched, or ingested. It contains hydroxyethylmethacrylate (HEMA) in amounts that violate the Federal Hazardous Substances Act. Consumers should check any jewelry made with the resin to ensure it is fully cured; if any liquid or residue remains, it should not be worn and should be kept away from children. Once fully cured, the resin is no longer hazardous.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to cease using the jewelry-making kits immediately and contact LaRose Industries for a full refund. LaRose will reach out directly to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: LaRose recalls Cra-Z-Art Gemex and Gel2Gem jewelry kits due to potential skin, eye, and respiratory irritation risks. Full refund available.

recalls.Description:
Three sets of Yaomiao children's jewelry are being recalled due to hazardous levels of lead and cadmium, which violate federal safety regulations. Each set contains 3 to 12 pieces, featuring designs like unicorns, butterflies, hearts, turtles, stars, and rainbows. The jewelry is silver-colored with multicolored gems and is packaged in a lavender box labeled "A Special Gift for the Charming You." The brand name "Yaomiao" is visible on the box's plastic wrap.

The recalled jewelry poses a serious health risk to young children, as lead and cadmium can lead to toxic exposure if ingested. Parents are urged to take immediate action to protect their children from these dangerous products.
recalls.Title: Yaomiao Children's Jewelry Sets Recalled for Lead and Cadmium Risks; Sold Exclusively on Amazon
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact LordRoads at simlordroadple@163.com.

Images.Caption: Recalled Yaomiao Unicorn Children's Jewelry Set
Recalled Yaomiao Unicorn, Butterfly, and Rainbow Necklace and Earring Children's Jewelry Set
Recalled Yaomiao Unicorn Children's Necklaces and Rings Jewelry Set
The recalled Yaomiao jewelry comes inside a lavender box with "A Special Gift for the Charming You" printed on it
Recalled Yaomiao Unicorn Jewelry Set - Unboxed

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from January 2022 to March 2024, priced between $8 and $21.

Hazards.Name: Excessive lead and cadmium levels posing poisoning risks to children

Remedies.Name: Stop using the jewelry sets, keep them away from children, and contact LordRoads for a full refund. Consumers must dispose of the sets and send a photo of the disposed items to simlordroadple@163.com. LordRoads and Amazon will reach out to all known buyers.

recalls.metaDescription: Yaomiao children's jewelry sets recalled due to lead and cadmium hazards. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Newmemo is recalling its children's ring sets due to safety concerns regarding lead and cadmium levels that exceed federal regulations. These sets, which include 36 rings in various designs, are packaged in a pink heart-shaped display case. The product is identifiable by the label stating 'Newmemo' and the Amazon FNSKU X0034COQMP on the bottom of the case.
recalls.Title: Recall of Newmemo Children's Ring Sets Due to Lead and Cadmium Hazards
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should stop using the recalled rings immediately, keep them away from children, and contact Newmemo for a full refund. Reach out via email at cly2167@163.com, or visit their seller profile on Amazon at https://www.amazon.com/sp?ie=UTF8&seller=AVVUCA891OMBV and select 'Ask a question.'

Images.Caption: Recalled Newmemo Ring Set
Recalled Newmemo Ring Sets
Newmemo and "Amazon FNSKU X0034COQMP" appear on a label on the underside of the ring's packaging

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively online at Amazon.com from January 2022 through March 2024 for approximately $12.

Importers.Name: Memovan Technology Industrial Co. Limited, (dba Newmemo), of China

Hazards.Name: Lead and cadmium content exceeding federal safety standards, posing health risks to young children.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the rings, keep them away from children, and contact Newmemo for a refund. Consumers must dispose of the jewelry and provide a photo of the disposed items to cly2167@163.com.

recalls.metaDescription: Newmemo recalls children's ring sets due to hazardous lead and cadmium levels. Contact for refunds and safety information.

recalls.Description: Fossil Group is recalling a braided black bracelet included in Skechers watch and jewelry gift sets due to the presence of high levels of lead and cadmium. The bracelet features a braided design and has metal clasps on both ends. The accompanying watch is marked with the code number 'IF2812307' and the model number 'SR9082' on its back.
recalls.Title: Fossil Group Recalls Skechers Gift Set Bracelet Due to Toxic Lead and Cadmium Levels
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, consumers can contact Fossil Group at 800-842-8621, available from 8 a.m. to 8 p.m. CT on weekdays and 9:30 a.m. to 7 p.m. CT on weekends. Alternatively, reach out via email at info@fgservices.com or visit www.fossilgroup.com/recalls/ for details.

Products.Name: Braided Black Bracelet from Skechers Gift Set

Recalled Bracelet

Manufacturers.Name: Fossil Group Inc., of Richardson, Texas

Retailers.Name: Available at Skechers stores nationwide and online at Amazon.com, Watchstation.com, and Skechers.com from August 2023 to January 2024, priced around $45.

Importers.Name: Fossil Partners, L.P. of Richardson, Texas

Hazards.Name: High levels of lead and cadmium in the bracelet clasp pose health risks, especially to children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the bracelet immediately, dispose of it, and contact the retailer for a full refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Fossil Group recalls a bracelet from Skechers gift sets due to toxic lead and cadmium. Stop using it and seek a refund.
